REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (79 Manchester Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $583,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt/review of the order). No further bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
